# Minimal Python deps for native (non-Docker) usage on ROS 2 Jazzy / Ubuntu 24.04.
# Prefer `rosdep install` for ROS/system deps; this file is only for pip-only extras.
#
# For CUDA torch wheels, follow the official PyTorch instructions (varies by CUDA/driver).
simple-parsing
numpy<2
cupy-cuda12x
nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12
nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12
torch
transforms3d
ros2-numpy
ruamel.yaml
shapely
